items.title: 2026 California Classic Summer League

items.title: Scouting the Next Generation: My Evaluation of the Top International Prospects from the FIBA U17 World Cup
items.body_excerpt: I spent the past week in Istanbul, Türkiye scouting the FIBA U17 World Cup, one of my favorite events on the basketball calendar.
